title: Ouratea angustifolia

This family consists of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical regions. Ouratea angustifolia is a species within the genus Ouratea, which comprises various plant species. The classification of Ouratea angustifolia reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plant species. The specific classification of Ouratea angustifolia can be further understood through phylogenetic analysis and botanical studies.
